mapper.select: SELECT id, brand, model, memory_size, memory_type, memory_bus_width, base_clock, boost_clock, tdp, interface_type, release_date, create_time, update_time FROM gpu_info
SELECT id, brand, model, memory_size, memory_type, memory_bus_width, base_clock, boost_clock, tdp, interface_type, release_date, create_time, update_time FROM gpu_info WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, brand, model, memory_size, memory_type, memory_bus_width, base_clock, boost_clock, tdp, interface_type, release_date, create_time, update_time FROM gpu_info WHERE model = #{model}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO gpu_info (brand, model, memory_size, memory_type, memory_bus_width, base_clock, boost_clock, tdp, interface_type, release_date, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{brand}, #{model}, #{memorySize}, #{memoryType}, #{memoryBusWidth}, #{baseClock}, #{boostClock}, #{tdp}, #{interfaceType}, #{releaseDate}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE gpu_info SET brand = #{brand}, model = #{model}, memory_size = #{memorySize}, memory_type = #{memoryType}, memory_bus_width = #{memoryBusWidth}, base_clock = #{baseClock}, boost_clock = #{boostClock}, tdp = #{tdp}, interface_type = #{interfaceType}, release_date = #{releaseDate}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, brand, model, memory_size, memory_type, memory_bus_width, base_clock, boost_clock, tdp, interface_type, release_date, create_time, update_time FROM gpu_info WHERE LOWER(brand) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{term}), '%') OR LOWER(model) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{term}), '%')
